parsed.fixed_xml: <ITEM>2. Bey Herrn Euler dem Buchbinder am Rheinsprung ist zu erfragen, wo folgende Bücher iraisonnablem Preiß zu haben seyen: <BIBL><TITLE>Janii & Tremellii Biblia cum Annotationibus</TITLE></BIBL>; <BIBL><TITLE>Acta Eruditorum Lipsiensia</TITLE> de An. <YEAR>1738</YEAR> & <YEAR>1739</YEAR>.</BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Mohemii</AUTHOR> <TITLE>institutiones histor. Christ.</TITLE> maiores <VOLUME>1. Seculi</VOLUME>, samtl. in <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT>.</BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Titus Livius</TITLE> ex Editione <AUTHOR>Joannis Clerici</AUTHOR></BIBL>; <BIBL><AUTHOR>Ovidii</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Tristia & Epistolae ex Ponto</TITLE> mit <AUTHOR>Sinceri</AUTHOR> Anmerckungen</BIBL>; <BIBL><AUTHOR>Herodianus</AUTHOR> Graece & Latine cum notis <AUTHOR>Bocceri</AUTHOR></BIBL>; <BIBL><AUTHOR>Elianus</AUTHOR> Graece & Latine cum notis <AUTHOR>Schefferi</AUTHOR></BIBL>; <BIBL><AUTHOR>Schrevelii</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Lexicon Graeco Latinum & Lat. Graec.</TITLE></BIBL>; <BIBL><AUTHOR>Nisselii</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Biblia Hebraea</TITLE></BIBL>; und <BIBL><AUTHOR>Buxtorfii</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Lexicon</TITLE>, samtl. in <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>.</BIBL></ITEM>
parsed.explanation: I fixed malformed XML and normalized obvious OCR-corrupted characters where they affected readability and structure. Main fixes: (1) escaped all bare '&' as '&' in text nodes/titles, (2) closed a missing </BIBL> after the Mohemii entry, (3) normalized corrupted words/characters (e.g., Bücher, Preiß, 4to, 8vo), (4) removed an unnecessary period between YEAR tags in the Acta entry for cleaner structure, and (5) preserved original semantic tagging (<BIBL>, <TITLE>, <AUTHOR>, <YEAR>, <VOLUME>, <FORMAT>) while only adding/fixing tags where structurally necessary.
